nasb.text: “If a man gives his neighbor money or goods to keep for him and it is stolen from the man’s house, if the thief is caught, he shall pay double.

esv.text: “If a man gives to his neighbor money or goods to keep safe, and it is stolen from the man’s house, then, if the thief is found, he shall pay double.

cnv.text: “如果人把銀子或家中物件交給鄰舍看守，這些東西從那人的家被偷去；如果把竊賊抓到了，竊賊就要雙倍償還。

ccb.text: “倘若有人把金钱或物件交给邻居保管，邻居家遭盗，盗贼被缉拿归案后要赔偿双倍；
